---
name: Suggesting new definition(s) or improving existing ones
about: Use to suggest one or more definitions for terms relating to NCAS, or improve
  existing ones
title: New/edited definition suggestion for <LIST TERM(S) HERE>
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Term

Which word or phrase are you defining?

> Example: Weather

---

## Is this...

- [ ] A new term
- [ ] An additional definition for an existing term
- [ ] An improvement to an existing definition

---

## Definition

Write your definition below.

Remember, we're aiming for the **Up-Goer Five** style: use only the thousand most common English words where possible.

```
Your definition goes here.
```

---

## Optional image

If you'd like an image to appear with this term, either:

- attach it to this issue,
- provide a link to it, or
- suggest an existing image already in the repository.

Please only suggest images that are free to reuse (or that you created yourself). Good sources include the [NCAS Flickr 'Inclusive Image Library' collection](https://ncas.ac.uk/for-staff/inclusive-image-library/) and [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/). If you're unsure about an image's licence, please mention where it came from and we can look into this.

---

## Anything else?

Any notes, context, or why you think this definition is useful.
